models.title: For sponsors
models.description: Your funding supports registered non-profits (501c3). AEGIS acts as the technical execution arm, translating STEM and innovation grants into deployed, measurable AI infrastructure.

models.title: For impact
models.description: AEGIS ensures grant funds deliver audited, high-ROI technical solutions—not just "awareness." Our Trust Architecture provides granular impact logs for every dollar spent.

featured.name: Arizona Asian American Association (4A)
featured.description: AEGIS serves as the exclusive technical execution partner for 4A's STEM initiatives, deploying AI literacy programs and educational infrastructure for the Arizona Asian American community.

steps.title: Initial Consultation
steps.description: We discuss your mission, target demographic, and funding sources to understand how AEGIS can amplify your impact.

steps.title: Scope & Proposal
steps.description: We design a technical solution aligned with your grant requirements, including compliance documentation.

steps.title: Deployment
steps.description: We build and deploy the infrastructure while you focus on community engagement.

steps.title: Impact Reporting
steps.description: Ongoing audit trails and dashboards to prove ROI to funders and stakeholders.
